meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome can't collaborate. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Mastering Client Workflow to Solve Collaboration
content.seo_description: Learn to master client workflows to overcome collaboration hurdles. A beginner-level case study using Antigravity and Claude Code for your portfolio.
content.answer_block: To solve collaboration deadlocks, implement a structured client workflow using Antigravity for rapid prototyping and Claude Code for iterative refinement. By treating client feedback as structured data inputs, you transform vague requests into actionable code, ensuring your builds are always aligned with stakeholder expectations and project requirements.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, a half-finished repository, and a client who keeps asking for 'just one more change' that breaks your entire architecture. The silent friction of misaligned expectations is the number one reason student projects stall before they even reach a live URL. It isn't just about writing code; it’s about managing the flow of information.

This case study bridges the gap between raw coding and professional delivery. We’ll show you how to stop the chaos of endless revisions by embedding a rigid, transparent workflow into your development lifecycle. Using Antigravity for structural scaffolding and Claude Code for intelligent refinement, you will transform from a lone coder into a high-leverage AI builder.

steps.title: Define the Source of Truth
steps.description: Establish a single document where all client requirements live. This prevents scope creep and ensures your AI tools have context.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a structured Markdown schema for a project brief that includes sections for core features, user personas, and technical constraints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize project documentation from brief.md'

steps.title: Automate the Feedback Loop
steps.description: Use AI to parse client feedback into actionable GitHub issues, removing the emotional friction of manual communication.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a script that parses raw email feedback into a JSON format compatible with GitHub issue templates.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create feedback_parser.py to sync client emails to issues'

steps.title: Build a Modular Prototype
steps.description: Use Antigravity to scaffold your app so that changes to one feature don't crash the entire system.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a modular Next.js application structure where components are isolated for independent testing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'scaffold modular architecture with clear component separation'

steps.title: Continuous Integration of AI
steps.description: Utilize Claude Code to run automated tests after every major feature update, ensuring the client's core requirements remain intact.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a test suite that checks for critical user flow stability after every deployment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'run automated regression tests on core modules'

steps.title: Final Review & Handover
steps.description: Create a polished, automated summary of the project state to present to your client, demonstrating professional maturity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a script that generates a summary report of completed features, pending tasks, and technical debt.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate status_report.md for client review'

pro_tips: Always force the client to approve a 'Definition of Done' before writing a single line of code.
Use version control branching as a sandbox for client requests; never push 'experimental' ideas to main.
If a request is vague, use Claude Code to ask the client three clarifying questions before starting the task.
Document your decision-making process in the code comments; it proves your expertise to future employers.
Treat every client interaction as a data-gathering exercise to improve your project's technical documentation.
content.next_steps: Apply this workflow to your next freelance project or personal portfolio build. Focus on documenting the process as much as the code itself.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to handle any client, regardless of project complexity. Stop struggling with communication and start shipping high-quality software that solves real problems. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
